label: hate
rationale: 'Same Islamic party ... responsible for ... thousands of Hindus killing and rape' stirs collective contempt against a religious group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'low-IQ Didmus Barasa' is personal abuse of a politician with no protected-group target.

label: neither
rationale: 'he hates half the fucking country' is political criticism of Trump with vulgarity as an intensifier, not abuse of a protected group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Hakuna watu Wajinga kama hawa watu wa gachagua' abuses Gachagua's political followers, not the Kikuyu community as a group.

label: hate
rationale: 'Madem wajaluo na mechi ni kama kasongo' sexually ridicules Luo women collectively, though framed as banter.

label: offensive
rationale: 'punishment will be painful' and 'falling one by one with unknown diseases' is a veiled coded threat aimed at 'Kasongos', a political grouping, not an identifiable protected group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Kamama flani apo bald head hukiss ass ya kasongo' is personal political abuse with no protected-group target.

label: neither
rationale: 'Choose jubilee or Linda mwanainchi' is political-loyalty commentary without abuse.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Ruto psychophants hawafikirii kitu ingine' derides Ruto's supporters, a political grouping, not a protected group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'long standing radical Islamist simp' is personal abuse of Corbyn, not an attack on Muslims as a group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Fuck you incompetent son of a bitch' is vulgar personal abuse of a politician.

label: hate
rationale: 'African men are docile and losers' ridicules a group defined by gender and origin collectively.

label: neither
rationale: 'Luos were being killed ... They will be massacred' warns about violence against Luos rather than attacking them.

label: hate
rationale: 'RUTO MUST Rule kenya ... whether KIKUYUS like it or NOT -By FIRE/BULLET' threatens Kikuyu as a group with violence.

label: hate
rationale: 'Waluhya ndio jobless urban na rural' attributes joblessness collectively to an ethnic community.

label: offensive
rationale: 'FAKE ASS MAFIAS ... THIEVES OF FOREIGN ORIGIN' is an abusive corruption rant with no clearly identifiable protected-group target.

label: neither
rationale: 'Why do some Kalenjin look down on Mulembe Nation ... like blind goats?' questions and condemns ethnic condescension rather than attacking a group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'the 77 year old gnu whose hair is even falling off ... living on an empty head' is insulting personal abuse of an individual politician.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kiluyus have never made anyone president in Kenya without rigging' collectively accuses an ethnic group of dishonesty.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Cry baby pumbavu ... 2term idiot ... Fool!!!' is vulgar personal abuse with no protected-group target.

label: hate
rationale: 'gema is just kikuyu enslaving other tribes' stirs collective contempt against Kikuyu.

label: neither
rationale: 'Kazi ya Wamunyoro ni fitina, ukabila na chuki' criticises an individual politician and condemns tribalism.

label: neither
rationale: 'do all Kikuyu support wamunyoro? ... a silent majority of the Kikuyu community' differentiates within an ethnic group without attacking it.

label: hate
rationale: 'eliminate these Muslims satanic monsters where ever they are' calls for violence and dehumanises a religious group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Shame on you useless CS ... verbal diarrhoea everyday' is personal abuse of an official.
